name: Baked Cheese Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Core the tomatoes and scoop out the pulp, leaving the sturdy shell intact.
3. Sprinkle the shells lightly with salt.
4. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: grated cheese, toasted bread cubes, basil, salt, parsley flakes, cashews, melted butter, chopped onion, and tomato pulp.
5. Fill each tomato shell with the cheese mixture.
6. Place the stuffed tomatoes in the oven and bake, covered, for 30 minutes, or until the cheese has melted.
7. Serves 6.
8. For variation, cook the tomatoes on a grill for 15-30 minutes, depending on the heat of the fire.
